text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day after the Fan Fest, Gold City says she
wants to talk to me about something after
practice.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Listen, I... I finally figured it out.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I didn't become "empty," it's that I didn't have anything from the get-go.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I entered the Hanshin J.F. to live up to
expectations. Then I chose the Classic Triple
Crown because I didn't want to do as my manager
said.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You know what you call that? Being a stupid
rebellious teenager. I just do the opposite of what
I'm told.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I tricked myself into thinking I chose running for
myself, but I didn't.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I became a model and behaved how others
wanted me to. Then I chose to run and behave
how others didn't want me to.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I thought those were two different things. But
really, they were two sides of the same coin.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I let the voices of others dictate my choices. I
couldn't make any on my own.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
A sad, hollow doll. That was the real Gold City all
along.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And now, I don't even have that rebellious spirit
in me anymore.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No wonder I can't give an answer to why I run.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What're ya racing for?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So yeah... no point in running anymore.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I've lost it all. I have nothing now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: There is no "real me."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Everything I was chasing, everything I was so
excited to finally get and make mine—it was all
fluff.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And to think I kept telling myself I was going to
prove who I really was to everyone... What a joke.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: God, I'm such a loser. Such a freaking loser.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: You can still be successful without running.
You can still be successful without running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first three years of her career are very
important indeed. But if she wants to run again,
she can do so whenever and wherever she wants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All she'd be sacrificing is this moment... right here
and now.
choice_data_list: Quitting isn't the same as running away.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...You're right.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure my manager would make me into the
most popular model out there.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And you... well, you'd probably end up training
some other runner, but I'm sure you wouldn't mind
if I stopped by for fun every now and then.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And my fans... even if I stop running, they'll follow
me down another path.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I can't say it. I just can't say "I quit."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...I have to do this.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...See you after the race.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I could quit and still live out my best life. It'd be a
lot easier, that's for sure.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
God knows I've been in the trenches when races
didn't go my way. I literally have nothing but
painful memories... So why?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Why can't I say "I quit"?
choice_data_list: I bet you'll figure it out if you run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I drag Gold City, in her bewilderment, back to
the track. She looks a tad anxious...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Everything I've got? But...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: O-okay, geez, no need to yell...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What is Trainer thinking?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City starts running. At first, she's just going
through the motions, but soon...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Hey, how long are you going to make me run for?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Screw off! Are you even watching? I am running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Known to her many fans as Pretty City..."
"You're so pretty when you run!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"You looked empty."
"I can't believe a model can run like that!"
"Pretty..." "Pretty..." "Pretty..."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Shut up! Enough! I don't need this! If no one is
going to see me for who I am...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Then I don't need them! Just stop getting in the
way of my running!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Aaaahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Frick, I'm tired!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Way to drain me of energy right before a race!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No... way.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I can't. I can't end it here.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's exhausting, annoying, and painful...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But I don't want to quit. I want to run.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I want to run, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's only one reason why Gold City runs—because she wants to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rebellious teen or not, the choices she makes are
unmistakably her own.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It feels like such a childish reason to run... What if
I get hit with the "unbeautiful" again?
choice_data_list: You, right now, are incredibly beautiful.
You, right now, are incredibly beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list:
After seeing you run like that, no one would
ever want you to quit.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Didn't I tell you to stop calling me that?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: If you're the one saying it... it's not so bad.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her shy smile glows brightly beneath the sunset.
